name: Rhubarb Custard Pie
recipeIngredient: pastry for a 10-inch double crust pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom and sides of a 10-inch pie pan with pastry.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs until well combined.
3. Add milk, sugar, flour, cinnamon, and vanilla to the beaten eggs.
4. Mix in the rhubarb.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pastry shell.
6. Cover with the second layer of pastry. Seal the edges and trim excess dough.
7. Crimp the edges and cut slits in the top crust.
8. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 45-55 minutes, or until a thermometer inserted in the center reads 160°F (70°C).
